sql:
SELECT
            trtr.routenum,
            trtr.sysname
        FROM nia.tb_roadm_trunk_repeater trtr
        WHERE trunk_id = (SELECT tcat.link_id
                          FROM rca.tb_cluster_al_topology tcat
                          WHERE tcat.alarmno = (
                              SELECT AL.root_cause_alarm_noa
                              FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T
                                      LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AL.ticket_id = T.ticket_id
                                      AND AL.ticket_al_id = (
                                          SELECT max(ticket_al_id)
                                          FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current
                                          WHERE ticket_id = '1671777'
                                      )
                              WHERE T.ticket_id = '1671777'
                          )
        )
